name: AGENUS INC
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness Our Business Agenus is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on discovering and developing immunotherapies for cancer and infectious disease. Our primary business is immuno-oncology ("I-O"), where we are advancing antibody-based programs to activate innate and adaptive immunity, overcome tumor immune evasion and expand the population of patients who may benefit from immunotherapy.
